first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both award the same low score (2/10) for the same critical, job-relevant reason: a complete lack of leadership, management, and executive experience for a CTO role. The differences in phrasing and minor points of emphasis (e.g., estimating a '15+ year' vs '20-year' career) are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the core assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
